project: Unitree Go2 Autonomy & SLAM Stack Reference

rt/unitree/slam_mapping/points.description: Real-time mapping point clouds published by onboard SLAM node.

rt/unitree/slam_mapping/odom.description: High-frequency local odometry output during mapping runs.

rt/unitree/slam_relocation/points.description: Real-time localization point clouds aligned against active PCD map.

rt/unitree/slam_relocation/odom.description: Current global localized position of the robot relative to the map.

rt/slam_info.description: JSON string containing real-time system diagnostic parameters (CPU, CPU temperature, motor temperatures, battery voltage, active PCD map name, active planner states).

rt/slam_key_info.description: JSON string reporting state machine task status outputs (e.g., 'is_arrived': true).

StopMove.description: Instantly halts high-level locomotion command loop.

Euler.description: Adjusts body roll, pitch, and yaw attitude angles.

parameters.height: height offset in meters relative to default 0.33m [-0.18 ~ 0.03]

parameters.gait: gait profile ID (0: Idle, 1: Trot, 2: Trot-Run, 3: Climb, 4: Descend)
